notes: Independent gaming-systems testing and certification body. Publishes GLI standards covering casino gaming systems, online gaming, and lottery systems — including security and integrity requirements (GLI-19, GLI-33, GLI-27). The dominant authority for gaming-system security certification worldwide.

data.notes: Paid via GLI. GLI-19 (Interactive Gaming Systems), GLI-27 (Network Security Best Practices for Gaming), GLI-33 (Event Wagering Systems).
